# dotenv_file (Data Source)

Loads a `.env` file and exposes its key/value pairs to Terraform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Loads .env from the current working directory
data "dotenv_file" "local" {}

# All options
data "dotenv_file" "lambda" {
  env_path       = "../../.."
  env_file       = ".env.${var.environment}"
  exclude_envs   = ["NUXT_PUBLIC_FORCE_FASTLY_IMAGE_HOST"]
  sensitive_envs = ["NUXT_PUBLIC_SCRIPTS_USERCENTRICS_ID"]
  include_empty  = false
}

resource "aws_lambda_function" "this" {
  # ...
  environment {
    variables = merge(
      data.dotenv_file.lambda.values,
      data.dotenv_file.lambda.sensitive_values,
    )
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `env_file` (String) Name of the env file inside `env_path`. Defaults to `.env`.
- `env_path` (String) Directory containing the env file. Defaults to the current working directory (`.`).
- `exclude_envs` (List of String) These keys won't be included. Exclusive to `include_envs`.
- `include_empty` (Boolean) Is set to true, empty Keys will also be loaded (e.g. `FOO=`). Default is `false`
- `include_envs` (List of String) Only these keys will be included. Exclusive to `exclude_envs`.
- `sensitive_envs` (List of String) These keys will be set as `sensitive_values` instead of values.

### Read-Only

- `sensitive_values` (Map of String, Sensitive) Sensitive Key/Values pairs defined in `sensitive_envs`.
- `values` (Map of String) All Key/Values pairs without `sensitive_envs`.
